profile_backed_target.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-profile-pass19 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- --sample-size 30 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

optimization.lever: Exact rank-2 F64 sum fast path for 3x3 stride-1 SAME reduce_window geometry, with unrolled interior cells and order-preserving border cells.
optimization.guard: window_dimensions=3,3; window_strides=1,1; pad_lows=1,1; output dims equal input dims; tensor element count equals rows*cols

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-rebench-pass19b cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- eval/reduce_window_64x64_3x3_same_f64 --sample-size 60 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

isomorphism_proof.output_order: Unchanged row-major output order: top row, interior rows left-to-right, bottom row.
isomorphism_proof.window_order: Border path uses increasing input rows and increasing input cols. Interior path emits the same top-left, top, top-right, middle-left, center, middle-right, bottom-left, bottom, bottom-right addition sequence.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Each output cell performs the same ordered f64 += sequence as the previous rank-2 F64 sum specialization; no reduction reassociation is introduced in source.
isomorphism_proof.literal_semantics: Input extraction still uses Literal::as_f64().unwrap_or(0.0), preserving numeric malformed-literal conversion and complex/bool zeroing behavior from the previous specialization.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: Not applicable; sum has no tie-breaking.
isomorphism_proof.rng: Not applicable; reduce_window is deterministic and consumes no RNG.
isomorphism_proof.scope: Non-3x3, non-stride-1, non-SAME-pad-low, non-rank-2, non-F64, max, and min paths are unchanged.

golden.description: 3x3 F64 input, 3x3 stride-1 SAME sum, exact row-major output [12,21,16,27,45,33,24,39,28].

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-check-pass19b cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-test-pass19b cargo test -p fj-lax --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-clippy-pass19b cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

validation.result: exit 1; file-wide inventory reports 5 existing panic criticals, 4336 warnings, and 243 info items; UBS internal formatting, clippy, cargo check, cargo test build, cargo audit, and cargo deny checks are clean

notes: An earlier range-loop-only 3x3 SAME specialization measured 133.45 us mean on vmi1227854, which was too weak and cross-worker, so it was refined before commit.
Build-slot leasing was unavailable; rch commands were run sequentially.
UBS direct-index warnings include the intentional hot-path indexing guarded by the exact rows*cols element-count precondition.
cargo fmt -p fj-lax also normalized one test assert in crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs; no behavior or optimization logic changed there.
